name: pip
desc: A seven-year-old village boy, genuinely small — a young child only half an adult's height — with messy straw-blond hair sticking out in tufts, bright eager wide eyes, a round childish face with a few freckles. He wears a simple green smock over brown trousers and small scuffed boots, and proudly holds his one good walking stick. Friendly neutral-warm expression.
sheetHint: same round child face, messy straw-blond hair, green smock, brown trousers, small boots, one good stick

expressions.happy: a huge delighted kid grin, eyes squeezed bright with joy
expressions.scared: wide wet frightened eyes, mouth trembling open
expressions.hollow: a subtle emptied stare — eyes unfocused and distant, mouth slack and still; gentle and quiet, not exaggerated
